validation_results.name: TypeScript
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec tsc --noEmit
validation_results.stdout_hash: zero-errors-all-packages-PG188-scope; local StripeCustomer interface extended with metadata field

validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators exec vitest run && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/modules/billing/__tests__/billing.router.test.ts && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec vitest run src/components/billing/__tests__/billing-settings.test.tsx
validation_results.stdout_hash: 2387 validator tests pass; 62 billing router tests pass; 14 billing-settings tests pass (8 original + 6 new for taxId/invoiceContact/bento/null-handling)

AC-B-01.evidence: BillingSettings uses div.grid.grid-cols-1.lg:grid-cols-12 bento layout per Module Settings Playbook

AC-B-02.evidence: Organization, Billing Email, Tax ID, Invoice Contact fields with Input/Label from @intelliflow/ui

AC-B-03.evidence: Billing address card is read-only with 'Contact support to update' note

AC-B-04.evidence: Save/Cancel in PageHeader actions; isDirty via JSON.stringify snapshot with refs for refetch-safety

AC-B-05.evidence: loading.tsx creates Suspense fallback skeleton; page.tsx wraps BillingSettings in Suspense

AC-B-06.evidence: billingInformationSchema and updateBillingInformationInputSchema extended with taxId/invoiceContact

AC-B-07.evidence: getBillingInformation returns metadata fields; updateBillingInformation calls stripe.updateCustomer (not getCustomer stub)

AC-B-08.evidence: 14 tests total (8+6); diff-coverage gate runs in pre-ship

AC-B-09.evidence: Auth-gated; Lighthouse Path C handled by CI lighthouserc.authenticated.js

AC-B-10.evidence: apps/web/src/components/sidebar/configs/billing.ts already had /billing/settings entry; no change needed
